en.text: a prolonged form of a primary verb, δόκω (used only in an alternate in certain tenses; compare the base of G1166) of the same meaning; to think; by implication, to seem (truthfully or uncertainly)

senses.gloss_en: a prolonged form of a primary verb, δόκω (used only in an alternate in certain tenses; compare the base of G1166) of the same meaning; to think; by implication, to seem (truthfully or uncertainly)
